UserPromptSubmit.matcher: checkpoint|compress context|update plan|show status|show progress|resume from summary

hooks.command: pwsh -NoLogo -NoProfile -Command "Write-Host '--- Context Economy Command Detected ---' -ForegroundColor Cyan; Write-Host 'Execute: .github/instructions/architecture/agentic/ntk-agentic-context-economy-checkpoint.instructions.md' -ForegroundColor Yellow"

pwsh -NoLogo -NoProfile -Command "Write-Host '--- Super Agent Closeout Reminder ---' -ForegroundColor Cyan; Write-Host 'If this session was change-bearing:' -ForegroundColor Yellow; Write-Host '  1. Suggest a commit message' -ForegroundColor White; Write-Host '  2. Update planning/active/ plan status' -ForegroundColor White; Write-Host '  3. Update CHANGELOG.md if release-worthy' -ForegroundColor White; Write-Host '  4. Move spec/plan to completed/ when materially finished' -ForegroundColor White"

pwsh -NoLogo -NoProfile -Command "$activePlans = @(Get-ChildItem 'planning/active/*.md' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.Name -notmatch 'README' }); if ($activePlans.Count -gt 0) { $ntk = if (Test-Path '.github/bin/ntk.exe') { '.github/bin/ntk.exe' } elseif (Test-Path '.github/bin/ntk') { '.github/bin/ntk' } elseif (Test-Path '.build/target/debug/ntk.exe') { '.build/target/debug/ntk.exe' } elseif (Test-Path '.build/target/debug/ntk') { '.build/target/debug/ntk' } else { 'ntk' }; Write-Host '' ; Write-Host '--- Active Planning Context ---' -ForegroundColor Cyan; & $ntk runtime export-planning-summary --print-only }"

pwsh -NoLogo -NoProfile -Command "$input = $env:CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT; if ($input -match 'git commit') { Write-Host '--- Post-Commit Reminder ---' -ForegroundColor Cyan; Write-Host 'Run post-commit sync if runtime assets changed:' -ForegroundColor Yellow; Write-Host '  pwsh -File scripts/runtime/install.ps1 -Profile github' -ForegroundColor White }"
